basic_details.job_title: YSP University Nauni Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Job Trainee Subject Matter Specialist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Dr. Yashwant Singh Parmar University of Horticulture & Forestry, (YSP University Nauni)
basic_details.short_information: The Dr. Yashwant Singh Parmar University of Horticulture & Forestry, Nauni (YSP University Nauni) has published the Job Trainee Subject Matter Specialist Recruitment 2026 on the official website of the university. The recruitment drive aims to fill 20 Job Trainee Subject Matter Specialist positions.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PwD of Himachal Pradesh only.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in concerned subject or M.Sc. with 55% marks and NET
qualification.details: Subject Matter Specialist (Food Science & Technology): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Vegetable Science): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Entomology): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Soil Science): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Fruit Science): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Agroforestry): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Extension Education/ Agricultural Extension): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders. Subject Matter Specialist (Plant Pathology): Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject relaxable to M.Sc. with consistently good academic record i.e. 55% marks at Master's level. A relaxation of 5% from 55% to 50% of marks at Master's level shall be provided to SC/ST categories. NET compulsory along with one publication in NAAS rated journal for Master's degree holders.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Subject Matter Specialist (Extension Education/ Agricultural Extension)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Subject Matter Specialist (Extension Education/ Agricultural Extension)

selection_process: Scorecard Evaluation Interview with 5 minutes PowerPoint Presentation
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for YSP University Nauni Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.uhf.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: YSP University Nauni Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the YSP University Nauni Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download YSP University Nauni Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for YSP University Nauni Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://www.uhf.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the YSP University Nauni recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the YSP University Nauni recruitment is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Job Trainee Subject Matter Specialist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies available for the Job Trainee Subject Matter Specialist post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Ph.D. in the concerned subject or an M.Sc. with 55% marks and NET qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 45 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply through the offline mode by sending their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 2000.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for SC/ST category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST category candidates is Rs. 1000.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the YSP University Nauni recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes scorecard evaluation and an interview with a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of YSP University Nauni: http://www.uhf.ac.in.
